_preset: python-library — an installable Python package (no long-running service). project_type=library runs build/test/quality/reproducibility + community/context/security, and skips the OPS rules. Add 'advanced' to profiles if you publish an SBOM or want code-scanning.
_bootstrap_command: BUILD-05 crown check on a clean checkout. Adjust for poetry/uv/hatch (e.g. 'uv sync && uv run pytest').
_profiles: add "advanced" to enable SBOM, static code-scanning, mutation testing, dependency-vuln-scan, coverage-floor.
